title: Dollhouse assembly
abstract: A dollhouse assembly comprising a first sidewall connected to a second sidewall connected to a bottom wall connected to the first sidewall. Each of the first sidewall, the second sidewall, and the bottom wall include a top end, a bottom end, a front end, a rear end, a first panel extending between the top end the bottom end, and a second panel superimposed on the first panel and extending between the top end and the bottom end. The first panel and the second panel of each of the first sidewall, the second sidewall, and the bottom wall cooperate to define a sheet receiving space. A sheet having a design is positioned within each of the sheet receiving spaces of each of the first sidewall, the second sidewall and the bottom wall.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: 1. A dollhouse assembly, comprising: a first sidewall having a top end, a bottom end, a front end, and a rear end, the first sidewall including a first panel extending between the top end and the bottom end, and a second panel superimposed on the first panel and extending between the top end and the bottom end, the first panel and the second panel cooperating to a define a sheet receiving space; a second sidewall having a top end, a bottom end, a front end, and a rear end, the second sidewall including a first panel extending between the top end the bottom end, and a second panel superimposed on the first panel and extending between the top end and the bottom end, the first panel and the second panel cooperating to define a sheet receiving space, the top end of the second sidewall connected to the top end of the first sidewall; and a bottom wall having a left end, a right end, a front end, and a rear end, the bottom wall including a first panel extending between the left end and the right end, and a second panel superimposed on the first panel and extending between the left end and the right end, the first panel and the second panel cooperating to define a sheet receiving space, the right end of the bottom wall connected to the bottom end of the second sidewall and the left end of the bottom wall connected to the bottom end of the first sidewall. 2. The dollhouse assembly of claim 1, comprising: a first connecting member connected to the top end of the first sidewall and the top end of the second sidewall to connect the first sidewall to the second sidewall, the first connecting member including a first clip portion connected to the top end of the first sidewall to connect the first panel of the first sidewall to the second panel of the first sidewall and a second clip portion connected to the top end of the second sidewall to connect the first panel of the second sidewall to the second panel of the second sidewall; a second connecting member connected to the bottom end of the second sidewall and to the right end of the bottom wall to connect to the second sidewall to the bottom wall, the first connecting member having a first clip portion connected to the bottom end of the second sidewall to connect the first panel of the 

 second sidewall to the second panel of the second sidewall and a second clip portion connected to the right end of the bottom wall to connect the first panel of the bottom wall to the second panel of the bottom wall; and a third connecting member connected to the bottom end of the first sidewall and the left end of the bottom wall to connect the first sidewall to the bottom wall, the third connecting member having a first clip portion connected to the bottom end of the first sidewall to connect the first panel of the first sidewall to the second panel of the first sidewall and a second clip portion connected to the left end of the bottom wall to connect the first panel of the bottom wall to the second panel of the bottom wall. 3. The dollhouse assembly of claim 1, further comprising: a first sheet positioned in the sheet receiving space of the first sidewall; a second sheet positioned in the sheet receiving space of the second sidewall; and a third sheet positioned in the sheet receiving space of the bottom wall. 4. The dollhouse assembly of claim 3, wherein the first panel and the second panel of each of the first sidewall, the second sidewall, and the bottom wall are transparent and the first sheet, the second sheet, and the third sheet include a design for displaying between the first panel and the second panel of each of the first sidewall, the second sidewall, and the bottom wall. 5. The dollhouse assembly of claim 1, further comprising: a front wall connected to the front end of the first sidewall, the front end of the second sidewall, and the front of the bottom wall. 6. The dollhouse assembly of claim 2, further comprising: a front wall; a fourth connecting member having a first clip portion connected to the front wall and a second clip portion connected to the front end of the first sidewall to connect the front wall to the first sidewall; 

 a fifth connecting member having a first clip portion connected to the front wall and a second clip portion connected to the front end of the second sidewall to connect the front wall to the second sidewall; and a sixth connecting member having a first clip portion connected to the front wall and a second clip portion connected to the front end of the bottom wall to connect the front wall to the bottom wall. 7. The dollhouse assembly of claim 1, further comprising: a top wall having a left end, a right end, a front end, and a rear end, the top wall including a first panel extending between the left end and the right end, and a second panel superimposed on the first panel and extending between the left end and the right end, the first panel and the second panel cooperating to define a sheet receiving space, the top wall connected to the top end of the first sidewall and the top end of the second sidewall. 8. The dollhouse assembly of claim 7, further comprising: a first connecting member connected to the top end of the first sidewall and to the left end of the top wall to connect the first sidewall to the top wall, the first connecting member including a first clip portion connected to the top end of the first sidewall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the first sidewall and a second clip portion connected to the left end of the top wall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the top wall; a second connecting member connected to the left end of the top wall and to the top end of the second sidewall to connect the top wall to the second sidewall, the second connecting member including a first clip portion connected to the left end of the top wall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the top wall, and a second clip portion connected to the top end of the second sidewall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the top wall; a third connecting member connected to the bottom end of the second sidewall and to the right end of the bottom wall to connect the second sidewall to the bottom wall, the third connecting member having a first clip portion connected to the bottom end of the second sidewall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the second sidewall, and a second clip portion connected to the right 

 end of the bottom wall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the bottom wall; and a fourth connecting member connected to the left end of the bottom wall and to the bottom end of the first sidewall to connect the bottom wall to the first sidewall, the fourth connecting member including a first clip portion connected to the left end of the bottom wall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the bottom wall, and a second clip portion connected to the bottom end of the first sidewall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the first sidewall. 9. The dollhouse assembly of claim 7, further comprising: a first sheet positioned in the sheet receiving space of the first sidewall; a second sheet positioned in the sheet receiving space of the second sidewall; a third sheet positioned in the sheet receiving space of the bottom wall; and a fourth sheet positioned in the sheet receiving space of the top wall. 10. The dollhouse assembly of claim 9, wherein the first panel and the second panel of each of the first sidewall, the second sidewall, the bottom wall, and the top wall are transparent and first sheet, the second sheet, the third sheet, and the fourth sheet include a design for displaying between first panel and the second panel of each of the first sidewall, the second sidewall, the bottom wall, and the top wall. 11. The dollhouse assembly of claim 7, furthering comprising: a front wall having a top end, a bottom end, a left end, and right end, the left end of the front wall connected to the front end of the first sidewall, the top end of the front wall connected to the front end of the first sidewall, the right end of the top wall connected to the front end of the second sidewall, and the bottom end of the front wall connected to the front end of the bottom wall. 12. The dollhouse assembly of claim 7, furthering comprising: a front wall having a top end, a bottom end, a left end, and right end, the left end; 

 a fifth connecting member having a first clip portion connected to the left end of the front wall and a second clip portion connected to the front end of the first sidewall to connect the front wall to the first sidewall; a sixth connecting member having a first clip portion connected to the top end of the front wall and a second clip portion connected to the front end of the top wall to connect the front wall to the top wall; a seventh connecting member having a first clip portion connected to the right end of the front wall and a second clip portion connected to the front end of the second sidewall to connect the front wall to the second sidewall; and an eighth connecting member having a first clip portion connected to the bottom end of the front wall and a second clip portion connected to the front end of the bottom wall to connect the front wall to the bottom wall. 13. A method of forming a dollhouse assembly, comprising: obtaining a first sidewall having a top end, a bottom end, a front end, and a rear end, the first sidewall including a first panel extending between the top end and the bottom end, and a second panel superimposed on the first panel and extending between the top end and the bottom end, the first panel and the second panel cooperating to a define a sheet receiving space; obtaining a second sidewall having a top end, a bottom end, a front end, and a rear end, the second sidewall including a first panel extending between the top end the bottom end, and a second panel superimposed on the first panel and extending between the top end and the bottom end, the first panel and the second panel cooperating to define a sheet receiving space; obtaining a bottom wall having a left end, a right end, a front end, and a rear end, the bottom wall including a first panel extending between the left end and the right end, and a second panel superimposed on the first panel and extending between the left end and the right end, the first panel and the second panel cooperating to define a sheet receiving space; connecting the top end of the first sidewall to the top end of the second sidewall; connecting the bottom end of the second sidewall to the right end of the bottom sidewall; and connecting the bottom end of the first sidewall to the left end of the bottom wall. 14. The method of claim 13, comprising: connecting a first clip portion of a first connecting member to the top end of the first sidewall to connect the first panel of the first sidewall to the second panel of the first sidewall and connecting a second clip portion of the first connecting member to the top end of the second sidewall to connect the first panel of the second sidewall to the second panel of the second sidewall, thereby connecting the first connecting member to the top end of the first sidewall and the top end of the second sidewall to connect the first sidewall to the second sidewall; connecting a first clip portion of a second connecting member to the bottom end of the second sidewall to connect the first panel of the second sidewall to the second panel of the second sidewall and connecting a second clip portion of the second connecting member to the right end of the bottom wall to connect the first panel of the bottom wall to the second panel of the bottom wall, thereby connecting the second connecting member to the bottom end of the second sidewall and to the right end of the bottom wall to connect to the second sidewall to the bottom wall; connecting a first clip portion of a third connecting member to the bottom end of the first sidewall to connect the first panel of the first sidewall to the second panel of the first sidewall and connecting a second clip portion of the third connecting member to the left end of the bottom wall to connect the first panel of the bottom wall to the second panel of the bottom wall, thereby connecting the third connecting member to the bottom end of the first sidewall and the left end of the bottom wall to connect the first sidewall to the bottom wall. 15. The method of claim 13, further comprising: positioning a first sheet in the sheet receiving space of the first sidewall; positioning a second sheet in the sheet receiving space of the second sidewall; and positioning a third sheet in the sheet receiving space of the bottom wall. 16. The method of claim 13, further comprising: obtaining a front wall; connecting the front wall to the front end of the first sidewall, the front end of the second sidewall, and the front end of the bottom wall. 17. The method of claim 14, further comprising: obtaining a front wall; connecting a first clip portion of a fourth connecting member to the front wall and connecting a second clip portion of the fourth connecting member to the front end of the first sidewall to connect the front wall to the first sidewall; connecting a first clip portion of a fifth connecting member to the front wall and connecting a second clip portion of the fifth connecting member to the front end of the second sidewall to connect the front wall to the second sidewall; and connecting a first clip portion of the sixth connecting member to the front wall and connecting a second clip portion of the sixth connecting member to the front end of the bottom wall to connect the front wall to the bottom wall. 18. The method of claim 13, comprising: obtaining a top wall having a left end, a right end, a front end, and a rear end, the top wall including a first panel extending between the left end and the right end, and a second panel superimposed on the first panel and extending between the left end and the right end, the first panel and the second panel cooperating to define a sheet receiving space; connecting the top wall to the top end of the first sidewall and the top end of the second sidewall. 19. The method of claim 18, comprising: connecting a first clip portion of a first connecting member to the top end of the first sidewall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the first sidewall and connecting a second clip portion of the first connecting member to the left end of the top wall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the top wall, thereby connecting the first connecting member to the top end of the first sidewall and to the left end of the top wall to connect the first sidewall to the top wall; connecting a first clip portion of a second connecting member to the left end of the top wall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the top wall and connecting a second clip portion of the second connecting member to the top end of the second sidewall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the 

 top wall, thereby connecting the second connecting member to the left end of the top wall and to the top end of the second sidewall to connect the top wall to the second sidewall; connecting a first clip portion of a third connecting member to the bottom end of the second sidewall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the second sidewall and connecting a second clip portion of the third connecting to the right end of the bottom wall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the bottom wall, thereby connecting the third connecting member to the bottom end of the second sidewall and to the right end of the bottom wall to connect the second sidewall to the bottom wall; connecting a first clip portion of a fourth connecting member to the left end of the bottom wall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the bottom wall and connecting a second clip portion of the fourth connecting member to the bottom end of the first sidewall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the first sidewall, thereby connecting the fourth connecting member to the left end of the bottom wall and to the bottom end of the first sidewall to connect the bottom wall to the first sidewall. 20. The method of forming a dollhouse of claim 18, further comprising: positioning a first sheet in the sheet receiving space of the first sidewall; positioning a second sheet in the sheet receiving space of the second sidewall; positioning a third sheet in the sheet receiving space of the bottom wall; and positioning a fourth sheet in the sheet receiving space of the top wall. 21. The method of claim 19, furthering comprising: connecting a first clip portion of a fifth connecting member to the left end of the front wall and connecting a second clip portion of the fifth connecting member to the front end of the first sidewall to connect the front wall to the first sidewall; connecting a first clip portion of a sixth connecting member to the top end of the front wall and connecting a second clip portion of the sixth connecting member to the front end of the top wall to connect the front wall to the top wall; connecting a first clip portion of a seventh connecting member to the right end of the front wall and connecting a second clip portion of the seventh connecting 

 member to the front end of the second sidewall to connect the front wall to the second sidewall; and connecting a first clip portion of an eighth connecting member to the bottom end of the front wall and connecting a second clip portion of the eighth connecting member to the front end of the bottom wall to connect the front wall to the bottom wall. 22. A kit for forming dollhouse assembly, comprising: a first sidewall having a top end, a bottom end, a front end, and a rear end, the first sidewall including a first panel extending between the top end and the bottom end, and a second panel superimposable on the first panel and extending between the top end and the bottom end, the first panel and the second panel cooperating to a define a sheet receiving space; a second sidewall having a top end, a bottom end, a front end, and a rear end, the second sidewall including a first panel extending between the top end the bottom end, and a second panel superimposable on the first panel and extending between the top end and the bottom end, the first panel and the second panel cooperating to define a sheet receiving space, the top end of the second sidewall connectable to the top end of the first sidewall; and a bottom wall having a left end, a right end, a front end, and a rear end, the bottom wall including a first panel extending between the left end and the right end, and a second panel superimposable on the first panel and extending between the left end and the right end, the first panel and the second panel cooperating to define a sheet receiving space, the right end of the bottom wall connectable to the bottom end of the second sidewall, and the left end of the bottom wall connectable to the bottom end of the first sidewall. 23. The kit of claim 22, further comprising: a first connecting member connectable to the top end of the first sidewall and the top end of the second sidewall to connect the first sidewall to the second sidewall, the first connecting member including a first clip portion connectable to the top end of the first sidewall to connect the first panel of the first sidewall to the second panel of the first sidewall and a second clip portion connectable to the 

 top end of the second sidewall to connect the first panel of the second sidewall to the second panel of the second sidewall; a second connecting member connectable to the bottom end of the second sidewall and to the right end of the bottom wall to connect to the second sidewall to the bottom wall, the first connecting member having a first clip portion connectable to the bottom end of the second sidewall to connect the first panel of the second sidewall to the second panel of the second sidewall and a second clip portion connectable to the right end of the bottom wall to connect the first panel of the bottom wall to the second panel of the bottom wall; and a third connecting member connectable to the bottom end of the first sidewall and the left end of the bottom wall to connect the first sidewall to the bottom wall, the third connecting member having a first clip portion connectable to the bottom end of the first sidewall to connect the first panel of the first sidewall to the second panel of the first sidewall and a second clip portion connectable to the left end of the bottom wall to connect the first panel of the bottom wall to the second panel of the bottom wall. 24. The kit of claim 22, further comprising: a first sheet positionable in the sheet receiving space of the first sidewall; a second sheet positionable in the sheet receiving space of the second sidewall; and a third sheet positionable in the sheet receiving space of the bottom wall. 25. The kit of claim 24, wherein the first panel and the second panel of each of the first sidewall, the second sidewall, and the bottom wall are transparent and the first sheet, the second sheet, and the third sheet include a design for displaying between the first panel and the second panel of each of the first sidewall, the second sidewall, and the bottom wall. 26. The kit of claim 22, further comprising: a front wall connectable to the front end of the first sidewall, the front end of the second sidewall, and the front of the bottom wall. 27. The dollhouse assembly of claim 23, further comprising: a front wall; 

 a fourth connecting member having a first clip portion connectable to the front wall and a second clip portion connectable to the front end of the first sidewall to connect the front wall to the first sidewall; a fifth connecting member having a first clip portion connectable to the front wall and a second clip portion connectable to the front end of the second sidewall to connect the front wall to the second sidewall; and a sixth connecting member having a first clip portion connectable to the front wall and a second clip portion connectable to the front end of the bottom wall to connect the front wall to the bottom wall. 28. The dollhouse assembly of claim 22, further comprising: a top wall having a left end, a right end, a front end, and a rear end, the top wall including a first panel extending between the left end and the right end, and a second panel superimposable on the first panel and extending between the left end and the right end, the first panel and the second panel cooperating to define a sheet receiving space, the top wall connectable to the top end of the first sidewall and the top end of the second sidewall. 29. The kit of claim 28, further comprising: a first connecting member connectable to the top end of the first sidewall and to the left end of the top wall to connect the first sidewall to the top wall, the first connecting member including a first clip portion connectable to the top end of the first sidewall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the first sidewall and a second clip portion connectable to the left end of the top wall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the top wall; a second connecting member connectable to the left end of the top wall and to the top end of the second sidewall to connect the top wall to the second sidewall, the second connecting member including a first clip portion connected to the left end of the top wall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the top wall, and a second clip portion connected to the top end of the second sidewall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the top wall; a third connecting member connectable to the bottom end of the second sidewall and to the right end of the bottom wall to connect the second sidewall to the bottom wall, the third connecting member having a first clip portion connected 

 to the bottom end of the second sidewall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the second sidewall, and a second clip portion connected to the right end of the bottom wall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the bottom wall; and a fourth connecting member connectable to the left end of the bottom wall and to the bottom end of the first sidewall to connect the bottom wall to the first sidewall, the fourth connecting member including a first clip portion connected to the left end of the bottom wall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the bottom wall, and a second clip portion connected to the bottom end of the first sidewall to connect the first panel to the second panel of the first sidewall. 30. The kit of claim 28, further comprising: a first sheet positionable in the sheet receiving space of the first sidewall; a second sheet positionable in the sheet receiving space of the second sidewall; a third sheet positionable in the sheet receiving space of the bottom wall; and a fourth sheet positionable in the sheet receiving space of the top wall. 31. The kit of claim 28, wherein the first panel and the second panel of each of the first sidewall, the second sidewall, the bottom wall, and the top wall are transparent and first sheet, the second sheet, the third sheet, and the fourth sheet include a design for displaying between first panel and the second panel of each of the first sidewall, the second sidewall, the bottom wall, and the top wall. 32. The kit of 28, furthering comprising: a front wall having a top end, a bottom end, a left end, and right end, the left end of the front wall connectable to the front end of the first sidewall, the top end of the front wall connectable to the front end of the first sidewall, the right end of the top wall connectable to the front end of the second sidewall, and the bottom end of the front wall connectable to the front end of the bottom wall. 33. The dollhouse assembly of claim 29, furthering comprising: a front wall having a top end, a bottom end, a left end, and right end, the left end of the front wall connectable to the front end of the first sidewall, the top end of the front wall connectable to the front end of the first sidewall, the right end of 

 the top wall connectable to the front end of the second sidewall, and the bottom end of the front wall connectable to the front end of the bottom wall a fifth connecting member having a first clip portion connectable to the left end of the front wall and a second clip portion connectable to the front end of the first sidewall to connect the front wall to the first sidewall; a sixth connecting member having a first clip portion connectable to the top end of the front wall and a second clip portion connectable to the front end of the top wall to connect the front wall to the top wall; a seventh connecting member having a first clip portion connectable to the right end of the front wall and a second clip portion connectable to the front end of the second sidewall to connect the front wall to the second sidewall; and an eighth connecting member having a first clip portion connectable to the bottom end of the front wall and a second clip portion connectable to the front end of the bottom wall to connect the front wall to the bottom wall.
